# get_boundary_by_place_name { #socialinfrascorepy.get_boundary_by_place_name }

```python
get_boundary_by_place_name(client, query, country=None, state=None)
```

Get boundary by place name.

Resolves a single boundary polygon from a place-name search.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name    | Type     | Description                                                                                              | Default    |
|---------|----------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| client  | SIClient | A client from :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.client` authenticated with :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.sign_in`. | _required_ |
| query   | str      | Place name to resolve.                                                                                   | _required_ |
| country | str      | Country filter.                                                                                          | `None`     |
| state   | str      | State / region filter.                                                                                   | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description                                                           |
|--------|------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame | A single-row DataFrame with boundary geometry, or empty if not found. |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> boundary = si.get_boundary_by_place_name(
...     authed, query="Ithaca", state="NY"
... )
```
